title: Nedologin
description:
(Fork of SimpleLogin)
Login/Auth mod for offline modded servers
body:
# Nedologin

[![Read the docs](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/readthedocs_vector.svg)](https://marduk.ru/docs/Nedologin/)
[![Check out the repository](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/git_vector.svg)](https://github.com/Ariss-Interactive/nedologin)

Nedologin is a utility authorization mod forked off SimpleLogin, providing offline mode authentication and integration with database engines.

You can find out how to configure the mod in the [wiki](https://marduk.ru/docs/Nedologin/)
